rationale.fidelity: Correct ex ante binary assortment decision, uncertainty, capacities, substitution mechanism, and contribution-margin objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Concrete actor, shift trigger, capacity trade-off, and substitution pathway; operational stakes are clear.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No novelty claim is made; contribution boundaries are stated, though no traceable literature positioning is attempted.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels substitution as modeled and rejects firm, causal, profit, speed, and welfare claims unsupported by the case.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful and disciplined framing with only absent literature positioning limiting the score.
